Name: Lightera
Description:

We are committed to building faster, more reliable and sustainable connections, empowering industries and communities for a smarter future.

Learn more at https://lightera.com/

Name: Middle East Fiber Cable Manufacturing Co. (ميفك)
Description:
شركة الشرق الأوسط لصناعة كابلات الألياف (ميفك) هي شراكة سعودية يابانية مقرها في الرياض، المملكة العربية السعودية. تأسست شركة ميفك في عام ١٩٩٥، وهي شركة رائدة في تصنيع كابلات الألياف الضوئية عالية الجودة ومزود حلول لقطاعي الاتصالات السلكية واللاسلكية والصناعة في أسواق الشرق الأوسط وشمال أفريقيا. ومن خلال التركيز على دعم العملاء والتحسين المستمر، تهدف مفك إلى تقديم حلول وخدمات مبتكرة تساهم بشكل كبير في الاتصال العالمي. إن القدرة الإنتاجية التي لا مثيل لها لشركة مفك ومجموعة المنتجات المتنوعة والتكنولوجيا المتطورة والخبرة العميقة وتمكين المعرفة وضمان الجودة تميزنا عن المنافسة. باعتبارها المورد الرئيسي لـ ٧٠٪ من البنية التحتية الرئيسية للشبكات في المملكة العربية السعودية، تعد شركة ميفك شركة رائدة موثوقة في هذه الصناعة.

Middle East Fiber Cable Manufacturing Company (MEFC) is a Saudi Japanese partnership based in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia. Established in 1995, MEFC is a leading manufacturer of high-quality fiber optic cables and a solution provider for the telecommunications and industrial sectors in the Middle East and North Africa (MENA) markets. With a focus on customer support and continuous improvement, MEFC aims to provide innovative solutions and services that contribute significantly to global connectivity. MEFC's unmatched production capacity, diverse product range, cutting-edge technology, profound expertise, knowledge empowerment, and quality assurance set us apart from the competition. As the go-to supplier for 70% of the major network infrastructure in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, MEFC is a trusted leader in the industry.

Website: http://www.mefc.com
Email: general@mefcf.com
Phone: 966112650777

Name: Polariton Technologies Ltd.
Description:
The world’s fastest and smallest electro-optic modulators, breaking the interconnect bottleneck.

Polariton Technologies builds the fastest and smallest electro-optic modulators. Our plasmonics modulators demonstrated to be more than 10-times faster than state-of-the-art photonic modulators (500 GHz world record in the lab). At the same time, the modulators are 100-times more compact, more energy-efficient, and potentially cheaper in production. These world-records are enabled by Polariton Technologies’ plasmonic modulator technology.
The tight confinement enables our modulators to efficiently modulate light on an ultra-compact footprint. The short interaction length, typically in the range of 10 µm, limits the influence of relatively high propagation losses of MIM waveguiding.

Plasmonic devices use metal for guiding SPPs, which has the advantage that they serve as their own electrical contacts. As devices are small, capacitance are small too, thus boosting the switching speed, due to small RC time constants. Further, in contrast to traditional electro-optic modulators, they are not hindered by the walk-off between electrical and optical waves.

Photonics and plasmonics complement each other: Given the right conditions, optical signals can be converted to plasmonic ones and vice versa. 

Polariton Technologies products and solutions are key components for test & measurement equipment, datacenters, medical imaging, space, automotive, sensing, telecommunication - long haul and 5G/6G and other customized applications, on request, through our consulting service. We cover the full value chain, from the design to the fabrication, testing, packaging, sales and support – including the Intellectual Property filing. Polariton is also working with the major Silicon Photonics and Optoelectronics partners worldwide and is open for new collaborations and projects.

Our mission is focused on empowering customers through adaptive, transformative technology solutions.

Klas, the Edge Technology Company.

Name: GUODONG Group
Description:
Founded in 1997, GUODONG Network Communications Group Co., Ltd. (hereinafter referred to as "GUODONG Communications") is a leading private communications enterprise group whose main business is the investment and operation of communications infrastructure. Its number of communications towers ranks 12th in the world.

Since its establishment, Guodong has always kept in mind its original dream of serving the country through industry, actively carried out the co-construction and sharing business of communication infrastructure, and pioneered the "co-construction and sharing model of tower construction, leasing and operation by an independent third party" in Jiangsu Province, which is known as the "Guodong Model" in the industry. Up to now, Guodong has established 31 provincial companies and more than 300 municipal business departments across the country, invested in the construction of 50,000 communication towers, and led a group of enterprises to join the ranks of communication infrastructure construction, playing a strong leading demonstration role in the participation of non-public economy and promoting co-construction and sharing. It is one of the only two "National Telecommunications Infrastructure Co-construction and Sharing Demonstration Bases" in China.

Name: Klas Government

Klas Government's capabilities include product design and configuration, network management, solutions development, fielding and training. The company employs dedicated personnel who offer engineering and support 24/7/365. Klas Government is a U.S. subsidiary of Klas Ltd. and was founded in 2009 to manage and effectively address U.S. government and federal requirements at all classification levels. Klas Government employs staff across two offices located in Herndon, VA and Tampa, FL with corporate offices located in Washington, D.C. and internationally in Dublin, Ireland. www.klasgov.com.

Atendemos os segmentos de supermercados, atacados, atacarejos e home centers, oferecendo projetos inovadores e de alta qualidade em cada detalhe, desde a concepção até a execução.

Name: Groupe Self Signal

- Self Signal Communication : concepteur et fabricant d’enseignes signalétiques ou tout autre visuel de communication, 

Aujourd’hui Self Signal c’est 120 collaboratrices et collaborateurs animés par le même esprit : être au service de ses clients, l’ADN même de l’entreprise.
 
La conception et l’évolution des produits sont mises au point par notre bureau d’études, dans une démarche éco-responsable, tant au niveau du choix des matériaux que des processus de fabrication.

Name: V-Solution Technology
Description:
Introduction:
Founded in 2007, V-SOL is a leading company in fiber optic wireless communication access with many years of experience. Our products are marketed in more than 80 countries/regions, serving more than 10 million broadband home users worldwide.

 Products:
Focusing on the R&D, production and sales of optical communication access products and LTE/5G wireless products, we develop, design and manufacture optical network unit (ONU/ONT), optical line terminal (OLT), voice gateway (VoIP gateway) and other series of access products with 3C, CE, FCC, ANATEL and other product certifications.

 R&D Strength:
V-SOL has over 100 R&D staff, 20% of which have earned senior professional titles. Moreover, nearly 150 valid independent intellectual property rights have been obtained. As a manufacturer, we have a manufacturing capacity of more than 8 million communication terminals per year. 

 Honors & Certifications:
V-SOL has acquired honors including National High-tech Enterprise, Double-soft Enterprise, National Technologically-advanced Enterprise, etc. In addition, certifications such as ISO9000, ISO14000, ISO45001, etc. are awarded.

● ZTE Micro's Strategic Partner
● Set up a joint laboratory for optical and wireless communications with the South China University of Technology
● Industry-University-Research Cooperation with Beijing Normal University Artificial Intelligence and Future Education Engineering Technology R&D Center and Beijing Normal University-Hong Kong Baptist University Joint International College of Science and Technology

Let’s fight for making the world fully access the network together! For more info, please visit our website: www.vsolcn.com. Feel free to contact us via support@vsolcn.com.

Name: DT SIGNS
Description:
DT SIGNS – Créateur de visibilité

Depuis plus de 60 ans, DT SIGNS imagine, conçoit et fabrique des enseignes, signalétiques, PLV et dispositifs digitaux LED destinés à renforcer la visibilité des marques sur l’ensemble du territoire français.
Reconnue pour son savoir-faire industriel et sa maîtrise technique, l’entreprise s’impose aujourd’hui comme un acteur global de la communication visuelle, capable d’intervenir sur tout type de projet, du concept à l’installation.

Nous collaborons avec de nombreux secteurs : retail, banques, hôtellerie, restauration, automobile, distribution, sièges sociaux, centres commerciaux ou projets sur mesure.
Chaque mission est portée par la même exigence : allier créativité, performance et fiabilité, pour donner à chaque marque une présence forte et cohérente.

Intégrée au Groupe DK, DT SIGNS incarne désormais une marque fédératrice regroupant plusieurs expertises complémentaires : design, digital, impression, installation et communication de marque.
Cette synergie renforce notre capacité à accompagner nos clients dans leurs déploiements nationaux avec une vision globale, fluide et intégrée.

Notre engagement qualité est reconnu par la certification Qualif’Enseigne Signalétique 3 étoiles (BVQI), gage de rigueur, de durabilité et de respect environnemental.
Équipée d’un parc machine moderne et d’équipes qualifiées en constante formation, DT SIGNS place la technologie et l’humain au cœur de sa performance.

Entreprise engagée et responsable, nous assurons également la gestion administrative des autorisations d’enseignes, des solutions de financement adaptées et un accompagnement personnalisé sur la TLPE.

Plus qu’un fabricant, DT SIGNS est un créateur de visibilité.
Notre mission : révéler la force des marques et leur offrir une visibilité durable, au service de leur image et de leur développement.

DT SIGNS – Créateur de visibilité.
Une marque, une vision, une exigence commune.

Name: TxWireless
Description:
At TxWireless, we help our clients navigate through their connected device development journey. Regardless of whether it’s a new design or enhancing an existing product with connectivity, we have the expert capabilities to accelerate the time to market for our clients.

The TxWireless capabilities ecosystem highlights each phase where we add value to our clients.

Leveraging years of expertise, our team follows a carefully defined process, ensuring a smooth and efficient navigation through the development journey. Our innovative engineering team brings a wealth of skills in design, test, security, certification, manufacturing, and lifecycle management, collectively mitigating potential risks in client deliveries.

This structured approach not only fosters clear communication and collaboration but also allows us to proactively identify and address any potential issues or risks that may arise during the project's lifecycle. Our goal is to deliver your project on time, within budget, and to your specifications, ensuring your satisfaction and the overall success of the project.

Name: BSJ Technology
Description:
BSJ Technology (Boshijie Tech) – a Shenzhen-listed IoT innovation leader (Stock Code: 301608) – empowers businesses worldwide with manufacturing hardware and AI-powered platforms that redefine operational efficiency. Founded in 2009, we specialize in enterprise-grade IoT solutions, driving digital transformation across innovative fleet management, smart mobility, and mobile payment ecosystems for clients in 30+ countries. BSJ Technology is at the forefront of manufacturing and delivering IoT solutions.

Our core offerings comprise a comprehensive portfolio of high-performance IoT hardware, including AI-enabled Mobile Digital Video Recorders (MDVRs), AI dashcams, GPS trackers, solar-powered trackers, OBD devices, and multi-channel video telematics terminals. These products are widely adopted in freight and logistics, public and school transportation, mining, oil & gas, cold chain, sanitation, and Taxi Cabs fleet management.

With 16 years of vertical expertise, our 400+ R&D specialists have pioneered more than 400 patented technologies and own an in-house AI algorithm team, positioning BSJ as a global authority in IoT innovation. At the heart of our innovation at scale is our advanced manufacturing capability, including 28 fully operational SMT production lines, which enables rapid and high-quality production of smart devices. We engineer end-to-end solutions and manufacture hardware that integrates AI-driven analytics, secure connectivity, and scalable IoT architectures to future-proof industries.

Name: DEVELOGIC - Subsea Technology
Description:
DEVELOGIC is a German-based company founded in 2000 with a focus on the development, manufacturing, and testing of turn-key customized data-acquisition and telemetry solutions for subsea monitoring applications.To be able to supply cost-efficient systems within a short delivery time, we developed a modular system containing all the necessary elements for transporting data from the depths of the ocean to the Customers’ office. Ad-hoc technologies range from acoustic recording and communication solutions, Dataloggers and pressure housings for Seafloor Landers, Instrument Moorings, and Telemetry Buoys.
Engineering & Design
The end-to-end engineering process integrates multi-physics and structural simulations with combined electronic and 3D mechanical design. Our world-class experts in electronics, mechanics, underwater acoustics, signal processing, and built-in software provide a full range of in-house development. Advanced PDM and ERP systems together with process management tools ensure consistent design documentation and 3rd-party components procurement for projects of all complexity levels.
Manufacturing & Quality control
Pick-and-place machines, a vapor phase soldering oven, and related inspection, test and measurement equipment allow prototyping of highly customized PCBs with the shortest turnaround times. Our up-to-date facility assures the creation of highly integrated and unique solutions for both small and large batches in the fields of mechanics and electronics. Computer-aided inspection of each component provides consistent high-quality results for our Customers.
Testing
Our extensive in-house capabilities for both mechanical and electronic system testing cover quality assurance and acceptance check topics for both development and projects delivery, as well as provide the possibilities for external custom services. A large range of test installations includes a large 5-axis coordinate measuring machine, climate chamber, 300 mm ID pressure chamber 800 bar.

Name: MMCall
Description:
Since 2009, MMCall has been a trusted provider of reliable on-site communication systems, serving a wide range of industries worldwide. Our solutions empower Fortune 500 manufacturers, essential healthcare facilities, government institutions, and hospitality providers, ensuring fast, effective communication where it matters most.

With millions of messages facilitated and tens of thousands of devices deployed, MMCall continues to set the standard in operational reliability and security, helping organizations maintain efficient, safe environments for both employees and clients.

Name: Aragon Photonics
Description:
Established in 2004 and based in Zaragoza, Spain, Aragon Photonics Labs S.L.U. is a technology company specializing in the creation, manufacturing, and sale of cutting-edge distributed fiber optic sensing solutions for various sectors, including power cables, railways, seismology, and perimeter security.

At Aragon Photonics, we believe in differentiation through innovation and develop our own technology, maintaining a growing patent portfolio.

With the experience and knowledge gained over the years, in 2014 we entered the distributed fiber optic sensing market by developing HDAS and BLAST. Today, our product portfolio encompasses a broader range of technologies, and our DFOS solutions are present in most strategic sectors.

Name: Hongdian Corporation
Description:
Founded in 1997, we are a 5G+AIoT expert and global provider of IoT products and solutions. With rapidly growing technology, we’ve helped our customers create smarter connected products with high quality, reliability, and rock-solid stability performance. 

We developed a broad portfolio of products for the most complex areas of Industry 4.0, smart city, smart grid, smart vending, etc. We control every stage of the product development cycle, allowing us to respond quickly and efficiently to market demands.
